creator: jinking.this@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 245162
Update download url and checksums.

The latest version without [jbr](https://github.com/JetBrains/JetBrainsRuntime) is 2022.2.5. The download links for other versions can be found at [jetbrains](https://www.jetbrains.com/idea/download/other.html).
It can be downloaded via [download-cf@jetbrains](https://download-cf.jetbrains.com/idea/ideaIU-2022.2.5-no-jbr.tar.gz) or [download-cdn@jetbrains](https://download-cdn.jetbrains.com/idea/ideaIU-2022.2.5-no-jbr.tar.gz)
